nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: Cincloramphus
nodes.summary: Cincloramphus（Cincloramphus）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联12种鸟类，如New Britain thicketbird、Rusty thicketbird、黄斑草莺等12种鸟类。

nodes.name: Santo thicketbird
nodes.summary: Santo thicketbird（Cincloramphus whitneyi）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Santo thicketbird。

nodes.name: Santo thicketbird
nodes.summary: The Santo thicketbird (Cincloramphus whitneyi) is a bird species. It used to be placed in the "Old World warbler" family Sylviidae, but it does not seem to be a close relative of the typical warblers; it belongs in the grass warbler family, Locustellidae. It is found on the Pacific Ocean island of Espiritu Santo in Vanuatu. The Santo thicketbird is around 16.5 cm long, a slender bird with long legs and a long tail. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist lowland forest and subtropical or tropical moist montane forest. It used to be considered conspecific with the New Britain thicketbird and the Bougainville thicketbird. References
